caption: In an indoor setting with a dark red background and vertical drapery, a yellow-skinned man with brown hair is positioned behind a tan wooden lectern. He is dressed in a dark blue suit jacket, a white collared shirt, and a blue tie. He leans slightly forward, resting his right hand on the side of the lectern while his left hand holds a microphone. Beside the microphone, a brown wooden gavel is visible. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a stationary position with a consistent smile on his face. The scene remains virtually static across the frames, with no visible movement, changes in expression, or shifting of objects. There is no on-screen text or logos present in the scene.
